title: Remove Netherite
body:
# THESE MODS ARE NOW UNSUPPORTED, I WILL NOT BE UPDATING THEM ANYMORE

## Why
Added in 1.16, Netherite served as a way to progress further than diamond. However, some believe this change to be a negative one, and is arguably too overpowered.

## What this mod does
This mod completely removes Netherite from the survival game, it can't be found underground, in chests, used in crafting recipes, used in achievements, **and is even replaced in the Lodestone recipe, which uses a diamond in its place.**
